news.headline: SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation
news.detail: AI chip maker closed Series F just 5 months after last mega-round, highlighting how enterprise AI infrastructure attracts massive, rapid capital.

news.headline: Taktile secures $110M for agentic AI decisions
news.detail: Goldman Sachs-led round backs platform automating workflows like loan approvals and fraud triage while preserving human oversight for regulated industries.

news.headline: General Intuition closes $320M gaming-data AGI bet
news.detail: Bezos-backed startup valued at $2.3B uses gaming data to teach AI spatial reasoning, addressing LLMs' weakness in understanding physical movement.

news.headline: Agentic AI moving from pilots to production
news.detail: 23% of organizations now scaling agentic AI systems with 39% experimenting, as AI agents autonomously handle multi-step workflows in enterprise settings.
